# x402.matija.eu

> x402 Playground is a pay-per-request API on Cloudflare Workers using the x402 protocol.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://x402.matija.eu/): Man-page overview of endpoints, payment flow, and configuration.
- [Payment Info](https://x402.matija.eu/payment-info): Machine-readable payment configuration.
- [OpenAPI](https://x402.matija.eu/openapi.json): OpenAPI 3.1 description of the service.

## Protected Endpoints

- [GET /api/data](https://x402.matija.eu/api/data): Example protected JSON response. Costs 1 USDC on Polygon.
- [GET /api/status](https://x402.matija.eu/api/status): Protected server status response. Costs 1 USDC on Polygon.

## Payment Details

- Protocol: x402 v2.
- Network: Polygon mainnet (eip155:137).
- Token: USDC.
- Price: 1 USDC per protected request.
- Facilitator: https://facilitator.payai.network.

## Crawl Policy

AI crawlers are welcome to index the public documentation endpoints. Protected API endpoints intentionally return HTTP 402 without payment.
